calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Thomas S. Lakritz, Esq. appeared for plaintiff City and County of San Francisco, CA a Municipal Corporation.
No appearance by All Persons Interested in the Matter of Validity, etc.
Default entered on June 24, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at default prove-up hearing was filed on September 8, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco, a Municipal Corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant All Persons Interested in the Matter of Validity, etc. as follows:

The Court obtain jurisdiction over all interested person under Code of Civil Procedure Section 861 and Government Code Section 6063, and that the acquisition, demolition, improvement, installation, equipping, rehabilitation, construction and/or reconstruction of an office building and related real property located at 525 Golden Gate Avenue is valid.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Application For Entry Of Court Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2008 Continued To Oct-17-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
